meaning: n.肉饭(由大米加鱼或肉及调料煮成)
examples: For those who can afford it in Bangladesh, there would also be lots of different types of roasted meat on offer, servedwith that perennial favourite, pilau rice.
And eat in Kazbek, a Georgian cuisine restaurant famous for its plov (pilau rice with meat) and khachapuri (warm white sour dough with melting cheese inside).
As the train headed towards London, chefs at the restaurant made up the order of two portions of chicken tikka, pilau rice, nan bread and a side order of onion bhajis.
